articles.title: Stock market today: Gift Nifty hints flat start; eight day trading stocks to buy on Monday, 6 July
articles.description: The Indian stock market is expected to open muted on Monday amid mixed global cues. While crude oil prices remain under pressure, the Sensex and Nifty 50 both gained last Friday, marking a continued upward trend in domestic equity benchmarks.
